name: LS Pro Formula | Semi-Solid Series
description: You have just found the best log home and wood siding stain and sealer on the market. Timber Pro’s Log & Siding Formula will deliver superior wood protection for all types of exterior wood siding such as cedar, fir, pine, redwood, cypress, teak, mahogany and more.

name: Crystal Urethane
description: Timber Pro's Crystal Urethane is an innovative formulation that seamlessly combines bio-preferred oils with acrylic, offering a crystal-clear finish that enhances the natural beauty of wood.

name: Internal Wood Stabilizer
description: Alternative for Waterproofing Wood …with zero VOC’s and zero hazardous ingredients.

name: Internal Concrete Sealer
description: Introducing the Ultimate Concrete Sealer and Waterproofing Solution

name: Internal Concrete Sealer
description: Introducing the Ultimate Concrete Sealer and Waterproofing Solution

name: Paver Stain
description: Protect, preserve and enrich porous masonry, pavers, and architectural natural stone with this environmentally safe, non-flammable transparent stain and sealer. Bring out the gleam and natural color of the pavers or stone and give it the wet look with clear paver stain formula, or enhance the color with one of our 6 transparent tones.

name: Ember Guard | Class A Fire Retardant
description: Ember Guard is a clear, non-toxic, water-based fire retardant designed for untreated wood surfaces. Independently tested to ASTM E84 standards by QAI Laboratories, it achieves a Class A fire rating with a Flame Spread Index (FSI) of ≤25 and a Smoke Developed Index (SDI) of 0—a performance level typically reserved for non-combustible materials.

name: Ember Guard Pro | Class A Fire Retardant
description: Ember Guard Pro is a clear, non-toxic, water-based mineral fire retardant designed for untreated wood surfaces. Independently tested to ASTM E84 (Extended 20 minutes) and ASTM E2768-11 standards by QAI Laboratories, it achieves a Class A fire rating with a Flame Spread Index (FSI) of 10 and a Smoke Developed Index (SDI) of 5—demonstrating superior flame and smoke suppression. ASTM E2768-11 meets the Wildland Urban Interface (WUI) code requirements in most jurisdictions and qualifies treated substrates as Ignition Resistant Material.

name: Clean & Brite
description: Clean & Brite is the best cleaner on the market for decks, fences, siding, logs, and masonry surfaces and contains no harmful bleach. This environmentally safe outdoor cleaner is very effective and thorough.

name: Strip & Brite
description: Our most powerful, professional grade exterior wood restoration product.

name: Deck & Fence | Microtint Series, Clear, & Color Correcting
description: Timber Pro’s Deck & Fence Formula is the best stain and sealer for decks, fences, and outdoor wood. It is naturally tough but different from other typical wood sealers.
